title: SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI=0 allows any payment to activate subscription
description: main.rs does not validate that subscription_price_zatoshi > 0. If SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI=0 is set, every invoice has amount_zatoshi=0. In scan_block(), the check 'if value_zatoshi < invoice.amount_zatoshi' becomes 'if value_zatoshi < 0' which is never true for u64. Any output to the invoice address — including a zero-value or dust output — satisfies the payment check and activates the subscription for free. Fix: add 'anyhow::ensure!(subscription_price_zatoshi > 0, ...)' in main.rs after parsing SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI.
